parameters.description: The version of the API to use
parameters.name: Anytype-Version

parameters.description: The ID of the chat object
parameters.name: chat_id

parameters.description: Return messages before this order ID
parameters.name: before_order_id

parameters.description: Return messages after this order ID
parameters.name: after_order_id

parameters.description: Maximum number of messages to return
parameters.name: limit
